name: syzygy-journal
description: SYZYGY is a trading journal app that helps you track trades and analyze performance.

scripts.setup-production-app: rm -rf client/dist client/node_modules node_modules && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build: cd client && npm install && npm run build
scripts.setup-project: npm i && cd client && npm i
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail " npm run server" " npm run client"
